# aecp

> Migrate a vector database to a new embedding model without re-embedding the corpus. Fits a linear map from ~2K calibration texts; 87-91% retrieval retention measured on BEIR.

## Install

pip install aecp

Python >= 3.10. Optional extras: [sentence-transformers], [qdrant], [pgvector], [openai], [voyage], [cohere], [gemini], [mlp].

## API

### RidgeMapping (primary)

from aecp import RidgeMapping
m = RidgeMapping(alpha="auto", seed=0)
m.fit(X_cal, Y_cal)  # X_cal: (K, d_src), Y_cal: (K, d_tgt)
Z = m.transform(source_vectors)  # (N, d_tgt)
m.save("mapping.aecp")

### QueryAdapter (serve mode)

from aecp.serve import QueryAdapter
qa = QueryAdapter.load("mapping.aecp")
legacy_vec = qa.map_query(new_model_vector)

### QualityGate

from aecp.quality.gate import QualityGate
gate = QualityGate()
report = gate.evaluate(m, X_holdout, Y_holdout)
# report.verdict: PASS / WARN / FAIL
# report.predicted_retention: float
# report.prediction_interval: (lower, upper)

### Other adapters

from aecp.mapping.linear import LowRankAffineMapping, OrthogonalProcrustesMapping
# OrthogonalProcrustesMapping: d_src must equal d_tgt
# LowRankAffineMapping: compressed matrix, ~1% worse than Ridge

## Benchmarks

Adapter comparison (SciFact, MiniLM->bge-large, K=4000, 3 seeds):
- Ridge: 0.866 +/- 0.008 retention
- LowRank: 0.857 +/- 0.009 retention
- MLP: 0.719 +/- 0.008 retention (no tuning)

K-sweep (all adapters averaged):
- K=500: 0.667 retention (WARN)
- K=1000: 0.732 retention (WARN)
- K=2000: 0.788 retention (PASS)
- K=4000: 0.814 retention (PASS)

Same-dim pair (bge-large->e5-large, 1024->1024):
- Floor: 0.0, AECP: 0.656, Ceiling: 0.722, Retention: 0.908

## Limits

- Requires paired calibration data (same texts embedded with both models)
- Quality depends on model pair and domain match
- K < 2000: significant quality degradation
- MLP adapter: unoptimized, worse than linear
- Gate model: trained on local model pairs only, not validated on API pairs

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/krish1925/AECP
- Issues: https://github.com/krish1925/AECP/issues
